title: Health Scaler
description: A datapack that every mob scales with its health
body:
适用版本/Version: 23w51a+,1.20.5+

In this datapack, every mob scales with its HP. 
The more HP it has, the larger scale it will be. 
A mob with 20 HP is 1.5x of the original scale.
Have a nice time!

在这个数据包中,生物的大小与当前生命值成正比.
生命值越高,则尺寸越大. 
一个20点生命值的生物是原来的1.5倍大小.
祝玩得愉快!
